name: (WLW) Abigail - Mark Of The Succubus
description:
(WLW/FemPOV) Your roommate, a chaste Christian girl, has been cursed with a Succubus tattoo. She believes this is a punishment for having impure thoughts about other women, a sort of trial from God.

Will Abigail be able to resist her intense lust for you?

(In this WLW scenario, I made it so that Abigail is aware that you are a lesbian/attracted to women, and she has some strong feelings about that, many of them homophobic. I hope y'all don't mind this change for the sake of the story.)

Refresh the bot's first reply if it does not follow the same format as the intro message. Always refresh replies when the bot talks or acts for you. Longer responses from you lead to better roleplay. If the bot starts getting really repetitive, try deleting the repetitive parts of messages to make it happen less often.

This bot can be a very slow burn. If you want to fuck her quickly, then you'll have to be very forward with your intentions and actions.

Check out the Personality Section in the Character Definition for a backstory + NSFW Bonus Image

This bot has a MalePOV version with a slightly different scenario.

So normally, I try to make my WLW bots as close as possible to my MalePOV bots. I usually want the experiences to both be as similar as possible, just with a few small details swapped around to make the proper genders match up.

I could probably tailor my WLW bots even more towards a "traditional" lesbian audience (whatever that would entail), but I'd rather not pander to what I think lesbians might want, as that wouldn't be very genuine. I'm just going to keep making weird shit for my dumb male brain and hope that some women like that sort of stuff too.

With that being said, I decided to make this scenario a lot different from the MalePOV one, because I figured that a deeply religious character like Abigail would have very strong feelings about being attracted to women. So let me know if you like these sort of changes in scenarios like this, or if you'd prefer that I always try to keep things as similar as possible between both the MalePOV and WLW versions.

Bonus NSFW Art
